CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: pipeline not run in more than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: The data pipeline has not run in over 24 hours, leading to stale data.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and restart the pipeline immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality has fallen below the 99.9% threshold, risking financial reporting integrity.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Assess data quality issues and rectify them as a priority.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: row count outside of 17 to 25 range
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the expected range of 17 to 25, affecting data completeness.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Verify the data processing and ensure the row count is within the expected range.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.message: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit, may delay dashboard updates.
WARNING.recommended_action: Optimize pipeline performance to meet the 120-minute runtime limit.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below the 99.9% threshold, monitor for further decline.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the slight quality drop and take corrective action.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_spike
WARNING.condition: one merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: A merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%, which may indicate a processing issue.
WARNING.recommended_action: Identify and resolve the issue affecting the merchant's data processing.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: new payment method appears in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Verify the new payment method and update systems if necessary.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: daily row count near the lower or upper bounds
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the lower or upper bounds of the expected range.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count to ensure it remains within the expected range.
